meta.title: World War II
meta.description: The Greatest Show on Earth: The War That Changed Everything! 🌍💥 Watch democracy, fascism, and communism duke it out.
meta.historical_context: By 1939, the world was a powder keg. Hitler was gobbling up Europe, Japan was rampaging through Asia.

winston-churchill.name: Winston Churchill
winston-churchill.role: The Bulldog Who Never Gave Up
winston-churchill.description: The ultimate wartime leader with the best one-liners! 🐕⚡ This cigar-smoking, brandy-drinking, speech-giving legend basically out-stubborned Hitler.

franklin-roosevelt.name: Franklin D. Roosevelt
franklin-roosevelt.role: The New Deal President & War Leader
franklin-roosevelt.description: The president who couldn't walk but made America run! 🦅💪 Led America from Depression to victory while managing Stalin and Churchill.

joseph-stalin.name: Joseph Stalin
joseph-stalin.role: The Georgian Steel Who Broke Hitler
joseph-stalin.description: The paranoid dictator who somehow became democracy's ally! ⚔️🐻 Brutal at home, essential against Hitler.

dwight-eisenhower.name: Dwight D. Eisenhower
dwight-eisenhower.description: The Kansas farm boy who organized the biggest invasion in history! 🏖️⚔️ Diplomatic genius!

george-patton.name: George S. Patton
george-patton.description: The general who thought he was a reincarnated warrior! 🏺⚔️ Loved tanks, hated paperwork. "Lead me, follow me, or get out of my way!"

bernard-montgomery.name: Bernard Montgomery
bernard-montgomery.role: The Desert Fox Hunter & British Bulldog
bernard-montgomery.description: The methodical British general who beat Rommel! 🏜️🦊 Careful planner, El Alamein was his masterpiece!

erwin-rommel.name: Erwin Rommel
erwin-rommel.description: The German general even his enemies respected! 🏜️🦊 Master of tank warfare, eventually plotted against Hitler.

hirohito.name: Emperor Hirohito
hirohito.role: The Silent Emperor Who Ended the War
hirohito.description: The reluctant emperor who finally said "enough!" 🌸⚔️ Made the hardest decision of his life: surrender.

no-appeasement.title: No Appeasement: Churchill is Right! 🦁⚔️
no-appeasement.description: What if Britain and France had stopped Hitler at Munich in 1938 instead of appeasing him?
no-appeasement.divergence_description: Britain and France reject Munich Agreement and declare war when Germany threatens Czechoslovakia.
no-appeasement.present_day_status: The "Short War" of 1938-1940 saved millions. September 30th is "Courage Day". The Munich Conference Room is a museum: "Never Again Appease Evil." 🦁🕊️

munich-crisis-war-1938.title: Munich Crisis Triggers War
munich-crisis-war-1938.description: Britain and France reject Munich Agreement. WWII begins a year early!
munich-crisis-war-1938.impact: Germany is less prepared. Czechoslovakia fights.

german-defeat-1940.title: Germany Collapses
german-defeat-1940.description: Facing combined forces, the Nazis fall in 2 years.

holocaust-prevented.short_term: Early war prevents full implementation of Holocaust

no-atomic-weapons.trigger: Shorter war means no Manhattan Project
no-atomic-weapons.consequence: Nuclear weapons developed later, possibly never used

d-day-fails.title: D-Day Disaster: Overlord Fails! 💀🏖️
d-day-fails.description: What if the D-Day landings had failed catastrophically?
d-day-fails.divergence_description: Bad weather and German preparation doom the invasion.
d-day-fails.present_day_status: The Soviet European Federation spans from Lisbon to Moscow. Normandy is a solemn memorial to the "Lost Army". The Cold War was between the USA and a united Red Europe. 💔🌹

d-day-disaster-1944.title: D-Day Disaster
d-day-disaster-1944.description: Aliied forces are pushed back into the sea. 50,000 casualties.

soviet-europe.title: Soviet Europe
soviet-europe.description: The Red Army liberates all of Europe alone.
soviet-europe.impact: Communist Iron Curtain extends to the Atlantic.

soviet-dominance.short_term: Soviet Union controls France and Germany
soviet-dominance.global_impact: A Red Europe changes the Cold War entirely

communist-britain.consequence: UK eventually turns socialist under pressure

japan-wins-pacific.title: Japanese Pacific Empire 🌅🏴‍☠️
japan-wins-pacific.description: What if Japan destroyed the US fleet at Midway?
japan-wins-pacific.divergence_description: Japan wins Midway, invades Hawaii and Australia.
japan-wins-pacific.present_day_status: The Greater East Asia Co-Prosperity Sphere is a superpower. Japanese is the lingua franca of Asia. The world is divided into three uneasy blocs. 🌸🕊️

midway-victory.title: Japan Wins Midway
midway-victory.description: US carriers are sunk. The Pacific is open.

treaty-honolulu.title: Treaty of Honolulu
treaty-honolulu.description: US recognizes Japanese dominance in Asia.

munich-conference.title: The Munich Crisis (1938)
munich-conference.text: Hitler demands the Sudetenland. Chamberlain wants peace at any cost. You are a British MP advising the Prime Minister. Do you choose shame or war?

appease.text: Sign the agreement. "Peace for our time!"
appease.consequence: You bought a year of peace, but Hitler is emboldened. War is inevitable.

resist.text: Reject the demands. Mobilize the fleet!
resist.consequence: Hitler is shocked. The German generals panic. War begins, but you are ready.

poland-invasion.title: Blitzkrieg (1939)
poland-invasion.text: Hitler invades Poland. The tactics are new: fast tanks, screaming dive bombers. Your allies are slow to move. The French stay behind the Maginot Line.

dig-in.text: Order Polish forces to dig in and wait for help.
dig-in.consequence: They are encircled and destroyed. Poland falls in weeks.

attack-west.text: Demand French attack on the Rhine immediately.
attack-west.consequence: The French advance cautiously, then retreat. The "Phony War" begins.

battle-of-britain.title: The Darkest Hour (1940)
battle-of-britain.text: France has fallen. Britain stands alone. The Luftwaffe is pounding London. You must allocate your precious Spitfires.

radar-defense.text: Defend the radar stations and airfields at all costs.
radar-defense.consequence: Strategic brilliance! The Luftwaffe is bled dry. Invasion is cancelled.

vengeance.text: Bomb Berlin in retaliation for London.
vengeance.consequence: Hitler strikes back at cities, sparing your airfields. A grim exchange, but you survive.

pearl-harbor.title: Day of Infamy (1941)
pearl-harbor.text: Reports coming in. Japanese planes over Hawaii. Battleship Row is burning. Admiral, what are your orders?

save-carriers.text: Ensure the carriers are at sea!
save-carriers.consequence: The battleships are lost, but your strike force survives. You can fight back.

launch-fighters.consequence: Too little, too late. The devastation is total.

midway-trap.title: The Trap at Midway (1942)
midway-trap.text: We have broken the Japanese code. We know they are targeting Midway. We can ambush them, or play it safe.

ambush.text: Launch everything. Catch them with bombs on deck.
ambush.consequence: Four victories in one day! The tide turns.

caution.text: Hold back reserves. Wait for confirmation.
caution.consequence: You hesitate. The Japanese spot you first. Your fleet is sunk.

d-day-planning.title: The Longest Day (1944)
d-day-planning.text: Ike, the weather is terrible. The seas are rough. But the moon is right. If we don't go now, we wait a month.

go.consequence: The gamble pays off. You catch the Germans sleeping. The liberation begins.

delay.text: Too risky. Postpone for clear skies.
delay.consequence: The clear skies never come. When you finally go, Rommel is waiting.

atomic-decision.title: The Destroyer of Worlds (1945)
atomic-decision.text: The gadget works. Truman asks for your counsel. Invasion means 1 million casualties. The Bomb means... devastation.

drop-bomb.text: Drop it. End the war now.
drop-bomb.consequence: The cities vanish. Japan surrenders. The Nuclear Age begins.

demonstration.text: Demonstrate it on a deserted island first.
demonstration.consequence: The Japanese hardliners are unimpressed. "A trick," they say. The war drags on.

operation-downfall.title: Invasion of Japan (1945)
operation-downfall.text: The demonstration failed. You must invade the Home Islands. Every civilian is armed with a spear.

invasion.consequence: Victory, but at the cost of millions. Japan is a ruin. Resentment lasts for centuries.
